original_image_tags: Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top edge of the page.

elements.description: A typed letter addressed to J. Edgar Hoover dated Aug 2, 1952, from Jackson, Minn, describing a physical sample and unexplained lights over a farm.

judge.reason: Both descriptions indicate there are no images on the page, with Description B explicitly stating it is typed text only and Description A only noting page structure elements, so they agree on the absence of visual content.
